subject: Re:
body:
sorry.. all SHOW.. he is a fucking showman.. a carnival huckster.. this, and the military budget and health care are all show... no substance.. just the 'biggest ever'.. for a guy with small hands..

---
**Lawrence M. Krauss**
Director, The Origins Project at ASU
Co-Director, Cosmology Initiative
Foundation Professor
School of Earth & Space Exploration and Physics Department

subject: Re:
body:
All shoe. This is not supporting science. It is all about the size of the rocket for him. All this will do is give him glory and not contribute to science.
